title: phyllagathis siamensis
intro: Phyllagathis siamensis, also known as Thai alangium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Phyllagathis siamensis are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various ailments.
